name: [GRIDHAND] E-commerce Agent - Post-purchase day 7 → review request

gridhand.description: When a customer makes a purchase at Joe's Barber Shop, a workflow is triggered seven days later, sending a personalized review request to the customer via email through the GRIDHAND system, which is integrated with Joe's online scheduling app, allowing the shop to track customer interactions and feedback. The email, sent at 10am on the seventh day, includes a link to the shop's Google My Business page, making it easy for the customer to leave a review, and also includes a brief message thanking the customer for their business and inviting them to share their experience. By automating this review request, Joe's Barber Shop is able to consistently collect valuable feedback and build a strong online reputation, attracting new customers and driving growth for the business.
